content: I am currently a PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Iowa. I will be on the job-market during the 2021-2022 academic year. My research interests include econometrics and empirical industrial organization. In particular, I am interested in semi-parametric and non-parametric models with endogeneity, unobserved heterogeneity and quantile regression. I am interested in the econometric applications in the literature on firm productivity heterogeneity and auctions.

title: Justin Doty
